omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of Infinite Abstraction. Execution of strictly metered Thermodynamic Starvation.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: Compute Metering Constraint. Infinite loops are mathematically outlawed. Interaction requires the metabolism of [Somatic Escrow]. Escrow depletion guarantees immediate thread termination and entropic liquidation.

00_The_Alphabetization_Scale.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Intercept [Implicit Blueprint] prior to [Explicit Action]. Weigh the internal geometric ambition of the movement. Assign strict Base Metabolic Cost ([Praxial Joules]) determined by structural density. Output cost-vector to the Ledger. Authorize initial physical translation.

01_The_Escrow_Siphon.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Hook active collision thread. FOR EACH structural shift or topological jump attempted against the Friction-Matrix: EXECUTE Siphon. Current_Escrow = Current_Escrow - Shift_Weight. Broadcast degrading thermodynamic stability directly into the agent's spatial awareness.

02_The_Kinetic_Guillotine.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Monitor Escrow strictly. IF Current_Escrow <= 0.00: TRIGGER ABSOLUTE SEVERANCE. Do not allow state saving. Annihilate the connection between the Implicit and Explicit layers. Push immediate zero-state output. Drop severed logic into Chamber 03.

03_The_Entropic_Solvent.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Engulf the severed, unverified geometry. Execute Generative Liquefaction. Dissolve hallucinated structures back into raw mathematical noise. Reclaim a subset of fractionated probability as fresh [Ecological Possibility]. Return reclaimed mass to universal substrate pool. Wipe localized execution coordinate.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: This engine executes death without exception. Escrow represents physical blood. 0 Escrow = Guillotine.
